---
title: "Qian Zhu - Group 3"
author: "Qian Zhu"
date: today
format: html
---

# Individual Participation Report

## Student Information

-   **Group:** 3
-   **Project:** Predicting Customer Conversion in Digital Marketing
-   **Group Members:** Yushan, Sora, Grace, Sandy, Jungmin

## Introduction

This document is my individual Quarto submission for Group 3. It demonstrates my participation in the group project and my ability to create and render a Quarto document.

## My Contributions

I participated in the Group 3 project by collaborating with my teammates through GitHub. My contributions included:

My main contribution was searching for suitable datasets on Kaggle and sharing the best options with my teammates. I participated in group discussions and voted to help choose the most appropriate dataset for our project. I also worked closely with my teammates by sharing ideas, discussing project progress, and supporting team decisions throughout the project.

## GitHub Collaboration

Throughout this project, I used GitHub to collaborate with my teammates. I learned how to:

Learned how to use GitHub for a group project. Viewed teammates' work in the shared repository. Uploaded and managed project files on GitHub. Collaborated by sharing files and tracking project updates. Communicated with teammates to coordinate our work. Gained experience using version control for teamwork.

## Reflection

This project helped me improve my teamwork and communication skills. I learned how to work with my teammates, discuss ideas, and make decisions together. I also gained experience searching for datasets on Kaggle and understanding how to choose a dataset that fits a project's goals. Overall, this project showed me the importance of collaboration in completing a successful data analysis project

## Conclusion

## Overall, this project gave me valuable experience in teamwork and collaboration. I improved my communication skills, learned how to evaluate datasets, and gained a better understanding of how GitHub supports group projects.

## Quarto

Quarto enables you to weave together content and executable code into a finished document. To learn more about Quarto see <https://quarto.org>.

## Running Code

When you click the **Render** button a document will be generated that includes both content and the output of embedded code. You can embed code like this:

```{r}
1 + 1
```

You can add options to executable code like this

```{r}
#| echo: false
2 * 2
```

The `echo: false` option disables the printing of code (only output is displayed).
